ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "raw" INTEGER /* Raw power of the item */,
  "element" TEXT /* Primary elemental attribute of the item */,
  "ele_value" INTEGER /* Value associated with the primary element */,
  "element_two" TEXT /* Secondary elemental attribute of the item */,
  "ele_value_two" INTEGER /* Value associated with the secondary element */,
  "affinity" INTEGER /* Affinity score indicating item compatibility */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., weapon, armor, consumable) */,
  "item_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the item's icon image */,
  "item_class" TEXT /* Class of the item (e.g., sword, shield, potion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level (e.g., Level 1, Level 2) */,
  "required_power" INTEGER /* Power requirement to achieve this level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Description of the level, including any special features or benefits */,
  "level_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the level icon image */,
  "level_requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements for achieving the level (e.g., specific quests, achievements) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enhancements" (
  "enhancement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enhancement option */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being enhanced */,
  "enhancement_type" TEXT /* Type of enhancement (e.g., damage increase, elemental boost) */,
  "benefit" TEXT /* Description of the benefit provided by the enhancement */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the enhancement */,
  "enhancement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the enhancement */,
  "enhancement_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the enhancement icon image */,
  "enhancement_requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements for applying the enhancement (e.g., specific materials, quests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enhancement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enhancements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for player account */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player in the game */,
  "player_avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's avatar image */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., online, offline, busy) */,
  "player_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last login */,
  "player_banned" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the player is banned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player owning the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned */,
  "item_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item (e.g., new, used, damaged) */,
  "item_equipped" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is currently equipped by the player */,
  "item_favorite" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is marked as a favorite by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_upgrades" (
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upgrade record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that was upgraded */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level to which the item was upgraded */,
  "upgrade_date" TEXT /* Date when the upgrade occurred */,
  "upgrade_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the upgrade */,
  "upgrade_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the upgrade (e.g., quest completion, player choice) */,
  "upgrade_requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements for the upgrade (e.g., specific materials, quests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_upgrades_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_upgrades_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item for which stats are recorded */,
  "times_used" INTEGER /* Number of times the item has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the item was last used */,
  "item_win_rate" REAL /* Win rate associated with the item */,
  "item_usage_rate" REAL /* Usage rate of the item among all players */,
  "item_feedback" TEXT /* Player feedback on the item (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_statistics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
